add_params.name: displayName
add_params.description: Template display name; also used as 'name' key internally

add_params.name: country
add_params.description: Country code (2-letter ISO code extracted from autocomplete object by formatter)

notes: customDataformatter maps form field names to the API body almost 1:1. The only difference: 'country' autocomplete object is unwrapped to its .value (2-letter code) before POST. PS1 reads all listed fields directly from $Request.body. No camelCase/PascalCase renaming happens here — these are template-store fields stored as-is in Azure Table Storage.
x_cipp_warnings: customDataformatter is present on the CippFormPage for this endpoint. Form field names and/or types may be renamed or restructured before POST. Verify the transformer function in the frontend page file and correct param names/types accordingly.
